name: Umeng+
description: Alibaba-owned mobile analytics, push, share, auth and APM platform (友盟+) for Chinese app developers.

seo.title: Umeng+ — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Umeng+: Alibaba-owned mobile analytics, push, share, auth and APM platform (友盟+) for Chinese app developers.

when_to_use: Mobile analytics SDK for Chinese iOS and Android apps
Push notification platform for Chinese consumer apps
In-app social sharing integration for Chinese platforms
Mobile APM for crash reporting in Chinese apps
Alibaba-backed auth and analytics for Chinese developers

pros: Free or low-cost analytics widely used in China
Covers analytics, push, share, auth, and APM
Massive adoption among Chinese app developers
cons: Privacy concerns flagged by Western app stores
Data ownership and governance questioned abroad
review.verdict: The default analytics stack for Chinese apps; a liability for apps distributed to Western privacy-conscious users.
review.best_for: Chinese mobile developers wanting a free, all-in-one local analytics and growth SDK.
review.not_for: Apps distributed outside China or teams with strict privacy and data governance rules.
